### 4.5 Team Members

The **Team Members** view (`#view-team-mgmt`, `index.html:2351`) shows the current user's team plus three pending-request queues. Sidebar nav `data-view="team-mgmt"` (`index.html:1850`, `nav-mgr-only`) with badge `#badge-ddr` (the **due-date-request** badge, not a member badge). The parallel **Organisation** view (`#view-org-page`, admin-only, `index.html:2365`) renders the same queues + a full-org member table via `renderOrgPage()`.

#### View shell — `#view-team-mgmt`

| Element | id | Filled by |
|---|---|---|
| Page header | `.ph-title` "Team Members" / `.ph-sub` "Members in your team" | static |
| Pending registrations | `#team-pending-registrations` | `_loadPendingRegs('team-pending-registrations', true)` |
| Pending profile updates | `#team-pending-profile-updates` | `_loadPendingProfileUpdates('team-pending-profile-updates')` |
| Pending due-date requests | `#team-pending-ddr` | `_loadPendingDueDateRequests('team-pending-ddr')` |
| Members table body | `#team-mgmt-body` | `renderTeamMgmt()` |

Table headers (verbatim, `index.html:2358`): **Employee · Role · Team · Reports To · Open Tasks · Actions**.

#### `renderTeamMgmt()` — `app.js.html:6344-6381`

- Only loads the three queues `if (_isManager(u.role))` (`app.js.html:6347-6351`).
- Member filter: `e.Team === myTeam || e.Sub_Department === myTeam` where `myTeam = u.team` (`app.js.html:6354-6357`). ⚠️ The `Sub_Department === myTeam` OR-clause compares a sub-dept value to the user's **Team** name — only matches when a sub-dept literally equals a team name; usually a no-op. Likely a copy artifact; harmless but imprecise. Flag PARTIAL.
- Per row: avatar initial, name+email, `pill(Role)`, `Team || '—'`, manager name via `findEmp(Manager_ID)`, open-task count (`APP.tasks` filtered by assignee membership + `_isOpen(Status)`), and an Actions cell.
- **Change-Role button** shown only when `canChange` is true:
  `canChange = e.Emp_ID !== u.empId && sameTeam && _allowedNewRoles(u.role, e.Role).length > 0`
  where `sameTeam = u.role !== 'Team Captain' || (e.Team === u.team || e.Sub_Department === u.team)` (`app.js.html:6365-6366`).
  Button: `<button class="btn btn-ghost" … onclick="openChangeRoleModal('{Emp_ID}','{Name}','{Role}')">Change Role</button>`; else cell shows `—`.
- Empty: `<tr><td colspan="6" …>No members found for your team</td></tr>`.

`renderOrgPage()` (`app.js.html:6385-6415`) is the admin variant: loads the queues with `myOnly=false`, maps over **all** `APP.employees`, shows Team + Sub_Department, and gates the Change-Role button only by `e.Emp_ID !== u.empId && _allowedNewRoles(...).length > 0` (no sameTeam clause — admins/SAs are cross-team).

#### Change Role modal — `#change-role-modal` (`index.html:3669-3689`)

- **Trigger:** `openChangeRoleModal(empId, empName, currentRole)` (`app.js.html:6439-6451`) from a member-row "Change Role" button.
- **Header:** "Change Role" with `×` close (`closeModal('change-role-modal')`).
- **Close mechanism:** backdrop click (`onclick="closeModal('change-role-modal',event)"` — closes only when `e.target` is the bg), `×` button, Cancel button. `closeModal` adds `.hidden` (`app.js.html:8355-8360`).
- **Data-in:** the three `onclick` string args (empId/empName/currentRole) from the table row. **Data-out:** `changeEmployeeRole` GAS call.

Fields:

**Field: Employee (read-only display)**
- element: `<div>`
- id/class: `#cr-emp-name`
- placeholder: (none)
- required: n/a (display)
- default: `'—'`; set to `empName` on open
- options: n/a
- handlers: none
- validation: none
- wired: yes — populated by `openChangeRoleModal`
- data source: `empName` arg (from the table row)

**Field: Current role (read-only display)**
- element: `<span>`
- id/class: `#cr-current-role`
- placeholder: (none)
- default: `'—'`; set to `currentRole` on open
- wired: yes
- data source: `currentRole` arg

**Field: New Role**
- element: `<select>`
- id/class: `.fc`, `#cr-role-select`
- placeholder: (none)
- required: effectively yes — `submitRoleChange` aborts if value empty
- default: the current role is rendered with `selected`
- options: **dynamically built** in `openChangeRoleModal` from `_allowedNewRoles(APP.currentUser.role, currentRole)` (`app.js.html:6444-6448`). Each option: `<option value="{role}"{ selected if ===currentRole}>{role}</option>`. The option set depends on the actor's role (verbatim from `_allowedNewRoles`, `app.js.html:212-224` — client mirror of backend `auth.gs:1786-1801`):

  | Actor role | Allowed new-role options (in order) |
  |---|---|
  | **Super Admin** | `Team Member`, `Intern`, `Team Facilitator`, `Team Captain`, `Admin`, `Super Admin` |
  | **Admin** (target is SA or Admin) | *(empty — no options; button hidden)* |
  | **Admin** (other targets) | `Team Member`, `Intern`, `Team Facilitator`, `Team Captain`, `Admin` |
  | **Team Captain** (target is TM or Intern) | `Team Member`, `Intern`, `Team Facilitator`, `Team Captain` |
  | **Team Captain** (other targets) | *(empty)* |
  | **Team Facilitator / Team Member / Intern** | *(empty — no Change-Role button at all)* |

- handlers: none directly on the select; submitted via Save button
- validation: `submitRoleChange` checks `_crEmpId` set and `newRole` non-empty (`app.js.html:6453-6456`)
- wired: yes
- data source: `_allowedNewRoles` (client mirror of backend)

⚠️ **TF gap:** `_isManager` includes `Team Facilitator`, so a TF sees the Team Members view and its three queues, but `_allowedNewRoles('Team Facilitator', …)` returns `[]` for every target → **no member ever shows a Change-Role button for a TF**, so the Actions column is always `—`. Intentional per the permission matrix, but the role gets a managerial page with one of its core actions permanently disabled.

**Buttons:**
| Label | onclick | Effect |
|---|---|---|
| Cancel | `closeModal('change-role-modal')` | hides modal |
| Save Role | `submitRoleChange()` (id `#cr-save-btn`) | submits role change |

**`submitRoleChange()` — `app.js.html:6453-6472`**

| google.script.run call | params | success | failure |
|---|---|---|---|
| `changeEmployeeRole(_crEmpId, newRole, APP.currentUser.email)` | targetEmpId, role, actor email | `_btnReset(btn,'Save Role')`; `!r.ok`→`toast(error,'error')`; else `toast('Role updated to '+r.newRole+'.', 'success')`, `closeModal`, `refresh()` | `_btnReset`, `toast(err.message,'error')` |

Return shape consumed: `{ok, newRole, empId, oldRole}` — uses `r.newRole` in the success toast.

**Backend `changeEmployeeRole` — `auth.gs:1803-1830`** (signature confirmed):
```javascript
function changeEmployeeRole(targetEmpId, newRole, email) {
  try {
    var user   = getCurrentUser(email);
    var emps   = dbGetAll('Employees');
    var target = emps.find(function(e) { return e['Emp_ID'] === targetEmpId; });
    if (!target) return { ok: false, error: 'Employee not found.' };
    …
```
Guards: target must exist; cannot change own role; `_allowedNewRoles(user.role, currentRole)` must be non-empty and contain `newRole`; **Team Captain** additionally requires `actorTeam === targetTeam` (`auth.gs:1819-1824`). Writes `Role`, audits `ROLE_CHANGE`, returns `{ok,empId,oldRole,newRole}`. ✅ Server re-validates the same matrix as the client — proper defense-in-depth.

#### Pending Request Queue 1 — Registrations

- Loader: `_loadPendingRegs(elId, myOnly)` (`app.js.html:6108-6119`) → `getRegistrationRequests(APP.currentUser.email, myOnly)`. team-mgmt passes `myOnly=true`; org-page passes `false`.
- Renderer: `_renderRegCards(reqs)` (`app.js.html:6080-6106`) — section header "Pending Registration Requests (N)"; per card: name, email, `pill(Role)`, optional Designation, Team, `Manager_Email || '—'`, `fmtDate(Requested_At)`, optional `Message`.
- Actions: `<button class="btn btn-sm btn-accent" onclick="approveReg(this,'{Req_ID}')">Approve</button>` and `<button class="btn btn-sm btn-danger" onclick="rejectReg(this,'{Req_ID}')">Reject</button>`.
- `approveReg(btn,reqId)` (`app.js.html:6418-6433`): `confirm('Approve this registration request?')` → `approveRegistration(reqId, email)`; success `toast('Registration approved! Employee ID: '+result.empId,'success')`, `refresh()`, re-render org/team. Failure toast.
- `rejectReg(btn,reqId)` (`app.js.html:6474-6491`): `prompt('Reason for rejection (optional):')` (Cancel=null aborts) → `rejectRegistration(reqId, email, notes)`; success `toast('Registration rejected.','warn')`, re-render.
- Backend `getRegistrationRequests` (`auth.gs:1659-1681`): non-managers get `[]`; Admin+`!myOnly`→all; otherwise team/designated-manager match (`Manager_Email===email || Team===userTeam`). `approveRegistration` (`auth.gs:1683-1741`) creates the Employee row, adds to team chat space, marks request Approved, returns `{ok, empId}`. `rejectRegistration` (`auth.gs:1743-1775`) marks Rejected with notes. Both enforce designated-manager-or-same-team for non-admins. ✅ wired.

#### Pending Request Queue 2 — Profile Updates

- Loader: `_loadPendingProfileUpdates(elId)` (`app.js.html:6303-6314`) → `getPendingProfileRequests(APP.currentUser.email)`.
- Renderer: `_renderProfileUpdateCards(reqs)` (`app.js.html:6122-6147`) — returns `''` if empty; header "Pending Profile Update Requests (N)"; green-tinted cards. Builds a `changes[]` diff list: Team (`Current_Team → New_Team`), Sub-dept, Manager (`→ New_Manager_Email`), Designation (`→ New_Designation`). Badge "Profile Update".
- Actions: `approveProfileUpd(this,'{Req_ID}')` / `rejectProfileUpd(this,'{Req_ID}')`.
- `approveProfileUpd` (`app.js.html:6316-6327`): `approveProfileUpdate(reqId, email)`; success `toast('Profile update approved!','ok')` ⚠️ (`'ok'` type has no CSS class — renders plain grey, see toast note), re-render. `rejectProfileUpd` (`app.js.html:6329-6341`): `prompt` reason → `rejectProfileUpdate(reqId, notes, email)`; success `toast('Profile update request rejected.','ok')` ⚠️.
- Backend `getPendingProfileRequests` (`auth.gs:450-478`): `_isManager` required; reads `Profile_Update_Requests`; Admins see all Pending, TC/TF see only same-team; enriches with `Emp_Name`, `Current_Team/SubDept/Manager`. `approveProfileUpdate` (`auth.gs:480-510`) applies New_* fields to the Employee, busts caches, marks Approved. `rejectProfileUpdate` (`auth.gs:512-522`) marks Rejected. ✅ wired.

#### Pending Request Queue 3 — Due-Date Change Requests (badge-ddr)

- Loader: `_loadPendingDueDateRequests(elId)` (`app.js.html:6228-6239`) → `getDueDateRequests(APP._verifiedEmail)`.
- Renderer: `_renderDueDateRequestCards(reqs)` (`app.js.html:6241-6269`) — returns `''` if empty; header "Pending Due Date Change Requests (N)"; indigo-tinted cards showing `Entity_Title`, `Entity_Type · Entity_ID`, badge "Date Change", `From: {Current_Date|Unscheduled} → {Requested_Date}`, `By: Requestor_Name`, `fmtDate(Created_At)`, optional `Reason`.
- Actions: `approveDueDateReq(this,'{Request_ID}')` / `rejectDueDateReq(this,'{Request_ID}')`.
- `approveDueDateReq` (`app.js.html:6271-6285`): `confirm('Approve this due date change?')` → `approveDueDateChange(reqId, APP._verifiedEmail)`; success `toast('Due date change approved!','success')`, `_ddrUpdateBadge()`, re-render org/team, `refresh()`. `rejectDueDateReq` (`app.js.html:6287-6301`): `prompt` reason → `rejectDueDateChange(reqId, notes||'', APP._verifiedEmail)`; success `toast('Request rejected.','warn')`, `_ddrUpdateBadge()`, re-render.
- **Badge** `#badge-ddr` (`index.html:1852`): updated by `_ddrUpdateBadge()` (`app.js.html:6215-6226`) → `getPendingDueDateCount(APP._verifiedEmail)`; sets text and toggles `.hidden` at 0. Initialized in `onPayloadLoaded` (`app.js.html:1065-1068`), guarded by a `typeof google.script.run.getPendingDueDateCount === 'function'` existence check (graceful if backend not yet deployed). ⚠️ Note: `#badge-ddr` lives on the **Team Members** nav item, so it counts due-date requests rather than team-member events — the visual association is non-obvious but matches the brief (badge-ddr is here intentionally).
- Backend `getDueDateRequests` (`dueDateRequests.gs:65-104`): all `Status==='Pending'`; Admins see all, others see `Approver_ID === user.empId` (Approver = the entity's Assigner). Enriches with `Requestor_Name`. `getPendingDueDateCount` (`:109-116`) returns `{ok,count}`. `approveDueDateChange` (`:121-150`) applies `Requested_Date` to the entity's `Due_Date` (Task) / `Deadline` (Function), marks request Approved; only Admin or the named Approver may approve. `rejectDueDateChange` (`:155-174`) marks Rejected with notes; same authz. ✅ wired.

#### Shared helpers used in this slice

- `_btnLoading(btn,text)` / `_btnReset(btn)` (`app.js.html:13538-13551`). 🔴 **`_btnReset` accepts only one argument** — it always restores `btn._origHTML`. Many callers pass a 2nd label arg, e.g. `_btnReset(btn,'Approve')`, `_btnReset(btn,'Save Role')` (`app.js.html:6276,6293,6320,6334,6461,6468`). **The 2nd arg is silently ignored.** Harmless (original HTML is restored correctly), but the intent ("reset to this label") is not honored — dead arguments. Low severity.
- `pill(s)` (`:13651-13655`), `fmtDate(v)` (`:13628-13632` → en-IN `dd Mon yyyy`), `toast(msg,type)` (`:13663-13669`).
- `findEmp(id)` (`:13560`) for manager-name lookup.

#### Toast type gap (cross-cutting)

`toast` adds class `toast {type}`. CSS only defines `.toast.success` (green), `.toast.error` (red), `.toast.warn` (orange); default `.toast` is dark grey `#323232` (`index.html:682-685`). The profile-update and DDR-submit success toasts use type **`'ok'`** (`app.js.html:6322,6336,6204`), which has **no matching CSS class** → renders as plain grey instead of green. Leave/registration/role flows correctly use `'success'`/`'warn'`/`'error'`. ⚠️ Cosmetic inconsistency.


## PART 5: COMPANY

The **Company** sidebar section (`index.html` lines 1855–1870) is rendered with class `nav-mgr-only hidden` and is unhidden only for manager+ roles (`adminRoles`/manager check in `onPayloadLoaded`, `app.js.html` ~1050). It groups: **All Tasks**, **All Projects**, **Organisation**, **Forms**, and the always-visible **Import Tasks** button (`#nav-import-btn`, unhidden for *every* logged-in user — see 5.5 gap).

Sidebar nav markup (verbatim):

```html
<div class="nav-sec nav-mgr-only hidden">Company</div>
<div class="nav-item nav-mgr-only hidden" data-view="all-tasks" onclick="navigate('all-tasks')"> … All Tasks </div>
<div class="nav-item nav-mgr-only hidden" data-view="all-projects" onclick="navigate('all-projects')"> … All Projects </div>
<div class="nav-item nav-mgr-only hidden" data-view="org-page" onclick="navigate('org-page')"> … Organisation </div>
<div class="nav-item nav-mgr-only hidden" data-view="forms" onclick="navigate('forms')"> … Forms </div>
<div class="nav-item hidden" id="nav-import-btn" onclick="openMigrateModal()"> … Import Tasks </div>
```

Icons throughout this section use **Material Symbols Outlined** (`table_rows`, `account_tree`, `corporate_fare`, `description`, `upload_file`). No stray `ti ti-*` classes found in any PART 5/6 region.

---

### 5.1 All Tasks

View `#view-all-tasks` (`index.html` 2270–2331). Render entry `renderAllTasks()` (`app.js.html` 6007–6057).

**Header / scope filter**

Field: Scope
- element:     `<select>`
- id/class:    `id="scope-all-tsk"` class `scope-select`
- placeholder: (none)
- required:    no
- default:     `<option value="">Organization (All Teams)</option>` selected
- options:     dynamically populated by `_populateScopeSelect('all-tsk')` (`app.js.html` 3259–3272). First static option `Organization (All Teams)` then one `<option>` per **unique `e.Team`** value across `APP.employees`, sorted alphabetically. The currently-selected `_ALL_SCOPE['all-tsk']` value gets `selected`.
- handlers:    `onchange="setAllScope('all-tsk',this.value)"` → sets `_ALL_SCOPE['all-tsk']` then re-calls `renderAllTasks()` (`app.js.html` 3242–3245)
- validation:  none
- wired:       yes
- data source: `APP.employees` (`Team` field)
- gaps:        Scope teams are derived from employees' `Team` only — a team that has tasks via `Assigned_Teams` but **no employees** never appears as a scope option. ⚠️ PARTIAL. Also `_getTeamIds(team)` returns `null` when a team has no employees, so selecting such a (manually-typed-into-state) team silently shows ALL tasks rather than an empty set.

**Scope behaviour (`renderAllTasks`)**

- For non-admin managers (TC/TF) the scope is force-defaulted to `APP.currentUser.team` on first render (lines 6011–6014) so they only ever see their own team — admins default to all teams.
- When a scope team is set, `tasks` is filtered via `_belongsToMyTeam(t, scopeIds, scopeTeam.toLowerCase())` (matches `Assigner_ID`, any `Assignee_IDs`, or `Assigned_Teams` name — `app.js.html` 3343–3350).
- `_applyAsgnTaskFilter(tasks,'all-tsk')` applies the by-me/to-me/team tab filter (no asgn-tab UI rendered in this view, so it falls through as `'all'`).
- `_tskApplyColFilters(tasks,'all')` applies the per-column filter-row selects.
- Group-by toggle: `_TSK_GRP_MODE['all']` (`'function'` default | `'date'` | `'week'`) dispatches to `_renderGroupedTasksHtml` (table into `#all-tasks-body`) or `_renderDateGroupedTasksHtml` / `_renderWeekGroupedTasksHtml` (into `#all-tasks-alt-body`).

**Column filter row** (`index.html` 2299–2311) — all `onchange="renderAllTasks()"`:

| Field | id | options |
|---|---|---|
| Function | `tf-all-fn` | dynamic (populated by `_populateTskFilterSelects('all')`) + static `All Functions` |
| Sub-Function | `tf-all-parent` | dynamic + `All Sub-Functions` |
| Task | `tf-all-sub` | dynamic + `All Tasks` |
| Assignee | `tf-all-asgn` | dynamic (`All Assignees`) |
| Assigner | `tf-all-asgr` | dynamic (`All Assigners`) |
| Project | `tf-all-proj` | dynamic (`All Projects`) |
| Status | `tf-all-status` | static — see verbatim below |
| Priority | `tf-all-pri` | static `All / Critical / High / Medium / Low` |
| Due Date | `tf-all-due` | `<input type="date">` (shows tasks due by this date) |
| Clear | button `ts-cf-clear` | `onclick="_clearTskFilters('all')"` icon `filter_alt_off` |

Status select options (verbatim, `tf-all-status`):
```
All Statuses | Yet to Start | Planning | WIP (0%-25%) | WIP (25%-50%) | WIP (50%-75%) | WIP (75%-100%) | Review | On Hold | Cancelled | Done
```
Note: legacy statuses (`WIP`, `Shared`, `Implemented`, `Stuck`) are **not** offered as filter options — imported tasks carrying those statuses can be hidden if filtered. ⚠️ minor.

**Batch add row** — `Add Tasks` trigger `_tskBatchOpen('all')`; panel `#ts-add-all` with `_atmAddRow()` / `_atmSaveAll()` / `_tskBatchClose('all')`. (Detailed in the task-CRUD slice.)

**`google.script.run` calls:** None directly in `renderAllTasks` — it renders entirely from in-memory `APP.tasks`. Data is loaded once via `getInitialPayload`/`getAuthorizedTasks`. For SA/Admin the backend returns *all* tasks; client-side scope/team filtering narrows it.

### 5.2 All Projects

View `#view-all-projects` (`index.html` 2334–2348). Render entry `renderAllProjects()` (`app.js.html` 6060–6077).

**Header**

Field: Scope
- element:     `<select>` `id="scope-all-prj"` class `scope-select`
- options:     identical mechanism to 5.1 — `_populateScopeSelect('all-prj')`, static `Organization (All Teams)` + one per unique team
- handlers:    `onchange="setAllScope('all-prj',this.value)"` → `renderAllProjects()`
- default:     `Organization (All Teams)`
- wired:       yes
- data source: `APP.employees`

Field: + New Project (button)
- element:     `<button class="btn btn-primary">`
- handlers:    `onclick="openNewProjectModal()"`
- wired:       yes (project create modal — covered in projects slice)

**Scope behaviour:** Non-admin managers force-defaulted to own team (6061–6063). When a scope team is set, `projs` filtered by `_belongsToMyTeam(p,…)` OR any `Owner_IDs` in scope (6067–6075). Result rendered as `el('all-projects-grid').innerHTML = _renderProjGrouped(_sortProjHierarchy(projs))` into `#all-projects-grid`.

- data source: `APP.projects` (in-memory; loaded via initial payload). No `google.script.run` call in render.
- wired:       yes
- gaps:        Same employee-derived-scope limitation as 5.1. ⚠️ PARTIAL.

### 5.3 Organisation

View `#view-org-page` (`index.html` 2365–2376). Render entry `renderOrgPage()` (`app.js.html` 6385–6415). Admin/Super-Admin only (nav-mgr-only, but content shows ALL employees + ALL pending requests). The parallel manager view is `#view-team-mgmt` / `renderTeamMgmt()` (6344–6381) which scopes to the manager's own team.

**Three pending-request queues** (rendered into divs in order):

1. `#org-pending-registrations` ← `_loadPendingRegs('org-pending-registrations', false)` (`myOnly=false` → admins see all teams' requests)
2. `#org-pending-profile-updates` ← `_loadPendingProfileUpdates('org-pending-profile-updates')`
3. `#org-pending-ddr` ← `_loadPendingDueDateRequests('org-pending-ddr')`

**Queue 1 — Pending Registration Requests** (`_loadPendingRegs` 6108–6119 → `_renderRegCards` 6080–6106)

- `google.script.run` call: `getRegistrationRequests(APP.currentUser.email, myOnly)` (backend `auth.gs` 1659: `getCurrentUser(email)`; non-managers get empty; admins+`!myOnly` get all pending; TC/TF get team-scoped).
- success: `result.requests` → `_renderRegCards`; failure / `!result.ok` → clears the container.
- Card fields shown: `First_Name`+`Last_Name`, `Email`, role pill, `Designation`, `Team`, `Manager_Email`, `Requested_At` (via `fmtDate`), optional `Message`.
- Buttons per card:
  - **Approve** `onclick="approveReg(this,'<Req_ID>')"` → confirm() → `approveRegistration(reqId, email)`; on ok toasts `Registration approved! Employee ID: <empId>`, calls `refresh()` + re-renders org/team view (`approveReg` 6418–6434).
  - **Reject** `onclick="rejectReg(this,'<Req_ID>')"` → `prompt()` for reason → `rejectRegistration(reqId, email, notes)` (6474–6491).

**Queue 2 — Pending Profile Update Requests** (`_loadPendingProfileUpdates` 6303–6314 → `_renderProfileUpdateCards` 6122–6147)

- call: `getPendingProfileRequests(APP.currentUser.email)` (backend `auth.gs` 450).
- Shows diffs: `Current_Team→New_Team`, `Current_SubDept→New_Sub_Department`, `→New_Manager_Email`, `→New_Designation`; `Emp_Name`, `Emp_Email`, `Requested_At`.
- Buttons: **Approve** `approveProfileUpd(this,'<Req_ID>')` → `approveProfileUpdate(reqId, email)` (6316–6327); **Reject** `rejectProfileUpd(this,'<Req_ID>')` → prompt → `rejectProfileUpdate(reqId, notes, email)` (6329–6341).

**Queue 3 — Pending Due Date Change Requests** (`_loadPendingDueDateRequests` 6228–6239 → `_renderDueDateRequestCards` 6241–6269)

- call: `getDueDateRequests(APP._verifiedEmail)` (backend `dueDateRequests.gs` 65).
- Shows `Entity_Title`, `Entity_Type · Entity_ID`, `Current_Date→Requested_Date`, `Requestor_Name`, `Created_At`, optional `Reason`.
- Buttons: **Approve** `approveDueDateReq(this,'<Request_ID>')` → confirm → `approveDueDateChange(reqId, email)` (6271–6285); **Reject** `rejectDueDateReq(this,'<Request_ID>')` → prompt → `rejectDueDateChange(reqId, notes, email)` (6287–6301). Both call `_ddrUpdateBadge()` and re-render.

**Employee table** (`#org-page-body`, 6393–6414) — columns `Employee | Role | Team | Reports To | Open Tasks | Actions`:

- Each row: avatar initial, `Name`, `Email`, role pill, `Team` + optional `Sub_Department` subtitle, manager name (`findEmp(e.Manager_ID)`), open-task count (`APP.tasks` filtered by assignee + `_isOpen`).
- Actions: **Change Role** button shown when `e.Emp_ID !== u.empId && _allowedNewRoles(u.role, e.Role).length > 0` → `openChangeRoleModal(empId,name,role)` (6439–6451).
- data source: `APP.employees`, `APP.tasks` (in-memory). No render-time GAS call for the table itself.
- gaps:        Table header has 6 columns but the empty-state colspan uses `colspan="6"` correctly. No pagination — all employees rendered at once (fine at current scale). ⚠️ minor (scalability only).

**Change Role Modal** (`#change-role-modal`)

- trigger: `openChangeRoleModal(empId, empName, currentRole)`
- header:  (static in index.html) — fields populated: `#cr-emp-name`, `#cr-current-role`
- Field: New Role
  - element: `<select id="cr-role-select">`
  - options: dynamic — `_allowedNewRoles(APP.currentUser.role, currentRole)`; current role pre-`selected`
  - data source: GAS-mirrored role rules helper (client `_allowedNewRoles`)
- Buttons: **Save Role** `id="cr-save-btn"` → `submitRoleChange()` → `changeEmployeeRole(_crEmpId, newRole, email)` (6453–6472); on ok toasts `Role updated to <newRole>.`, closes modal, `refresh()`.
- close: handled by `closeModal('change-role-modal')`.

### 5.4 Forms

View `#view-forms` (`index.html` 2647–2664), full-page editor `#view-form-editor` (2667–2696), respondent fill `#view-form-fill` (2699–2703). Frontend in `app.js.html` 14295–14811. Backend in `forms.gs`. **All forms run under per-user OAuth2** — created in the user's own Google account.

**Forms list (`renderForms` 14339–14351)**

- call: `gfListMyForms(APP.currentUser.email)` (backend `forms.gs` 149).
- success: maps `r.forms` → `FORMS_DATA` `[{Form_ID,Title,Created_At,Modified_At}]` then `_gfRenderList()`. If `r.needsAuth`/`!r.ok`/failure → `_gfShowConnect()` (shows a **Connect Google Forms** button → `_gfConnect` → `formsGetAuthUrl(email)` → opens OAuth popup).
- `_gfRenderList` (14369–14402) also fires `gfGetMyFormsMeta(email)` (sharing status per form) and `gfGetSharedForms(email)` (forms shared with the user → `#forms-shared-list`, each with a **Fill** link to `Responder_URL`).
- Each owned form card (`_gfRowCard` 14403–14420): icon, title + Draft/Shared badge, `<responseCount> responses · <Created_At>`, and three icon buttons:
  - **Share** (`share`) → `_gfOpenShareModal(formId,title)`
  - **Open in Google Forms** (`open_in_new`) → `window.open(f.editUrl,'_blank')`
  - **Delete** (`delete`) → `_gfDeleteForm(formId)` → confirm → `gfDeleteForm(formId,email)`

**Start-a-new-form templates** (`index.html` 2654–2660): five cards — `Blank form` (`gfNewForm()`), `Feedback` (`gfNewForm('feedback')`), `Survey` (`'survey'`), `Event RSVP` (`'rsvp'`), `Request` (`'request'`). Template definitions in `GF_TEMPLATES` (`app.js.html` 14316–14336). Header **New Form** button → `gfNewForm()`.

#### Form builder / editor

`gfNewForm(tpl)` (14476–14485) seeds `gfState` `{formId,title,description,questions[],focusIdx,settings}` and calls `_gfOpenEditor()`. `gfOpenForm(formId)` (14486–14503) calls `gfGetForm(formId,email)` to load an existing form then opens the editor.

**Top bar** (`index.html` 2669–2679):

Field: Form title (top bar)
- element: `<input class="gf-topbar-title" id="gf-topbar-title">`
- default: `Untitled form`
- handlers: `oninput="gfState.title=this.value"`
- wired: yes

Top-bar buttons: **Preview** `gfPreview()` (opens `/viewform` for saved forms, else in-app fill), **Undo** `gfUndo()`, **Redo** `gfRedo()`, **Settings** `gfSettings()`, **Send** `gfSend()` (saves then opens `/edit`).

Tabs (`#gf-tab-questions|responses|settings`) via `gfSwitchTab(tab)`.

**Title card** (`_gfRenderQuestions` 14530):

Field: Form title (body)
- element: `<input class="gf-title-input">`  placeholder `Untitled form`  oninput `gfState.title=...` (also mirrors to top bar)

Field: Form description
- element: `<textarea class="gf-desc-input">`  placeholder `Form description`  oninput `gfState.description=this.value`

**Per-question card** (14532–14587). Each question:

Field: Question text
- element: `<input class="gf-q-title-input">`  placeholder `Question`  onchange `gfState.questions[i].label=this.value`

Field: Question type (only when focused)
- element: `<select class="gf-q-type-select">`
- options: dynamic from `GF_TYPES` (14297–14314) — verbatim id→label list:
```
short → Short answer
long → Paragraph
choice → Multiple choice
checkbox → Checkboxes
dropdown → Dropdown
file → File upload
scale → Linear scale
grid → Multiple choice grid
checkgrid → Checkbox grid
date → Date
time → Time
number → Number
email → Email
phone → Phone
url → URL
section → Section
```
- handlers: `onchange="gfState.questions[i].type=this.value;_gfInitType(i,this.value);_gfRenderQuestions()"`
- wired: partial. 🟠 The editor renders option/scale UI only for `choice|checkbox|dropdown|scale|short|long|date|time` and the backend `_buildItem` (forms.gs 436+) must support each type. Types `grid`, `checkgrid`, `file` are offered in the dropdown but the editor draws **no editing UI** for them (no rows/grid config) — selecting them produces an empty question body. ⚠️ PARTIAL: grid / checkbox-grid / file types are exposed but not editable in the builder.

Options (choice/checkbox/dropdown):
- Field: Option N — `<input class="gf-opt-input">`, onchange `gfState.questions[i].options[oi]=this.value`; per-option delete `gf-opt-del`; **Add option** appends `Option <n>`.

Linear scale: two `<select>` (min `0|1`, max `2..10`) + optional min/max label inputs.

Question footer (focused): **Duplicate** `_gfDupeQ(i)`, **Delete** `_gfDelQ(i)`, **Required** toggle `<input type="checkbox">` onchange `gfState.questions[i].required=this.checked`.

**Floating add toolbar** (14589–14595): Add question (`short`), Add section (`section`), Multiple choice (`choice`), Checkboxes (`checkbox`), Dropdown (`dropdown`) — all `_gfAddQ(type)`.

**Settings tab** (`_gfRenderSettings` 14685–14696):

Field: Collect email addresses
- element: `<input type="checkbox">` toggle  onchange `gfState.settings.collectEmail=this.checked`  default off
- wired: partial — stored in `gfState.settings` and sent as `settingsJson`; backend's actual enforcement of email collection not verified in `_buildItem`/`gfPublishForm`. ⚠️

Field: Limit to 1 response per person
- element: `<input type="checkbox">`  onchange `gfState.settings.limitOne=this.checked`  default off
- wired: partial — same caveat (no backend enforcement visible). ⚠️

Field: Status
- element: `<select class="gf-q-type-select">`
- options (verbatim): `Draft | Active | Closed`
- handlers: onchange `gfState.settings.status=this.value`
- wired: yes — persisted to Forms sheet `Status` via `gfPublishForm`/`gfUpdateForm`

Field: Visibility
- element: `<select class="gf-q-type-select">`
- options (verbatim): value `All` → `Everyone in organization`; value `Team` → `My team only`
- handlers: onchange `gfState.settings.visibility=this.value`
- wired: yes — persisted to Forms sheet `Visibility`

Button: **Save Settings** → `_gfSave()`.

**Save pipeline** (`_gfSave` 14645 → `_gfDoSave` 14659):
1. Validates `gfState.title.trim()` non-empty (`Title is required.`).
2. `formsIsConnected(email)` guard — if not connected, toasts + `_gfShowConnect()`.
3. New form → `gfPublishForm(title, description, questionsJson, settingsJson, email)` (forms.gs 189). Returns `{ok, formId, editUrl, publishedUrl}`; sets `gfState.formId`. On `needsAuth` re-shows connect.
4. Existing form → `gfUpdateForm(formId, title, description, questionsJson, settingsJson, email)` (forms.gs 235).

**Responses tab** (`_gfRenderResponses` 14699–14735): for saved forms calls `gfGetResponses(gfState.formId, email)` (forms.gs 297); renders per-question summary bars/free-text, plus a link to `/edit#responses`.

#### Share-to-Notice-Board modal

Modal `#gf-share-modal` (`index.html` 3639–3666). Trigger: card share button → `_gfOpenShareModal(formId,title)` (14425–14439). Header **Share to Notice Board**.

- Field: Form (read-only `#gf-share-title`).
- Field: Visible to — `<select id="gf-share-vis">`, options (verbatim): value `All` → `Everyone in the organisation`; value `Team` → `My team only`. Pre-filled from `FORMS_META[formId].Visibility`.
- Hidden input `#gf-share-formid`.
- Buttons:
  - **Remove from Board** `#gf-unshare-btn` (shown only when already Active) → `_gfUnshare(this)` → confirm → `gfSetFormSharing(formId, 'All', false, email)`.
  - **Cancel** → `closeModal('gf-share-modal')`.
  - **Post to Notice Board / Update Sharing** `#gf-share-post-btn` → `_gfSubmitShare(this)` → `gfSetFormSharing(formId, vis, true, email)` (forms.gs 401 — `_isManager` gate; only creator or admin can change sharing). On ok updates `FORMS_META`, toasts, closes, `_gfRenderList()`.
- close: `closeModal('gf-share-modal')` (backdrop click + × button).

#### Respondent fill view (`_gfOpenFill` 14748 → `_gfSubmit` 14789)

- Renders each question type to an input; required questions marked `*`.
- Submit `_gfSubmit(formId)`:
  - Preview/`formId===''` → toast "preview, not saved"; otherwise reads `FORMS_DATA` to find the form's `Fields`, builds `answers{label:value}`, validates required.
  - call: **`submitFormResponse(formId, JSON.stringify(answers), APP.currentUser.email)`** (14810).

🔴 / ❌ **`submitFormResponse` BACKEND IS MISSING.** A repo-wide grep for `function submitFormResponse` returns **no matches** (forms.gs ends at `gfSetFormSharing`/`formsDisconnect`/`_buildItem`). The in-app fill view's Submit button will throw "function not found" at the `google.script.run` layer; the success handler that shows "Your response has been recorded." can never legitimately fire for a real form. In practice respondents are routed to the actual Google Form (`Responder_URL` / `/viewform`), so this in-app fill path is effectively dead. Flag as BROKEN.

### 5.5 Import Tasks

Trigger: `#nav-import-btn` `onclick="openMigrateModal()"`. Modal `#migrate-modal` (`index.html` 3169–3303). Frontend `openMigrateModal` (`app.js.html` 16192) and helpers 16229–16766. Backend `migration.gs`.

**Modal header:** `Import Functions, Sub-Functions & Tasks` (icon `upload_file`). Close: `closeModal('migrate-modal')` (× button + backdrop).

`openMigrateModal()` resets to step 1, clears `_migPreviewRows`/`_migCsvRows`, defaults to the URL tab, populates both project dropdowns from `APP.projects`, and calls `getDeployerEmail()` to fill `#mig-deployer-email`.

**Step 1 — source tabs** (`migSwitchTab(tab)` 16229):
- `#mig-tab-url` "Via Google Sheet URL", `#mig-tab-csv` "Upload CSV".

**URL panel** (`#mig-panel-url`):

Field: Google Sheet URL or ID *
- element: `<input class="fc" id="mig-sheet-url">`
- placeholder: `https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/…`
- required: yes (client check — empty → `Paste a sheet URL or ID.`)
- handlers: read by `migLoadPreview()` (16546); id extracted by `_migExtractId`
- validation: non-empty
- wired: yes

Field: Worksheet / Tab Name (optional)
- element: `<input class="fc" id="mig-sheet-name">`
- placeholder: `e.g. Tasks, Sheet1, Jan 2025…`
- required: no (defaults to first tab)

Field: Import into Project (optional)
- element: `<select class="fc" id="mig-proj-select">`
- default: `<option value="">— No specific project —</option>`
- options: dynamic — one `<option value="Proj_ID">Name</option>` per `APP.projects`
- data source: `APP.projects`

Button: **Preview Import →** `#mig-preview-btn` → `migLoadPreview()` → `migrationPreview(APP.currentUser.email, sheetId, sheetName)` (migration.gs 388). Status span `#mig-step1-msg`. Failure handler translates permission errors into "Share this Google Sheet with <deployer> (Viewer access)…". Available tabs hint shown via `#mig-tabs-hint`/`#mig-tabs-list`.

**CSV panel** (`#mig-panel-csv`):

Field: CSV File *
- element: hidden `<input type="file" id="mig-csv-file" accept=".csv,text/csv">` + visible **Choose CSV File** button (`el('mig-csv-file').click()`); filename shown in `#mig-csv-filename`.
- handlers: `onchange="migCsvFileSelected(this)"` (16243) enables the preview button.
- required: yes

Field: Import into Project (optional)
- element: `<select class="fc" id="mig-proj-select-csv">` — same population as URL tab.

Button: **Preview CSV →** `#mig-csv-preview-btn` (disabled until a file is chosen) → `migCsvPreview()` (16477). Reads file in-browser via `FileReader`, parses with RFC-4180 `_parseCsv` (16254), maps to rows via `_migCsvToRows` (16322). Hierarchy violations (`Sub-Function` without parent `Function`) are surfaced in `#mig-csv-msg` and skipped.

`_migCsvToRows` alias-matches headers (16328–16352) for Function/Sub-Function/Task/Assigner/Assignees/Status/Priority/Recurring/Start/Deadline/Due/Estimated Hours/Links. Status normalised to sheet-valid set (`STATUS_SHEET_VALID` 16369 + `STATUS_ALIAS` 16374); priority/recurring normalised against `PRIORITY_VALID`/`RECURRING_VALID`; comment rows (`#`) skipped.

**Step 2 — preview table** (`_migRenderPreview` 16598; markup 3252–3291):
- Type/row counts in `#mig-row-count`; warnings (`#mig-unmatched-warn`) for skipped rows + unmatched assigner/assignee names ("will default to you").
- Master checkbox `#mig-check-all` (`onchange="migToggleAll(this)"`) + per-row `.mig-row-cb`. `Select All` / `Deselect All` → `migSelectAll(bool)`.
- Columns: checkbox, Type badge (Function/Sub-Fn/Task), Function, Sub-Function, Task Title, Assigner, Assignees, Status, Priority, Date.
- **Back** → `migBack()` (returns to step 1). **Import Selected →** `#mig-import-btn` → `migConfirmImport()` (16708).

`migConfirmImport` branches by `_migSourceTab`:
- CSV → `migrationImportDirectRows(APP.currentUser.email, projId, rowsToSend)` (migration.gs 467).
- URL → `migrationImport(APP.currentUser.email, sheetId, projId, selectedRowNums, sheetName)` (migration.gs 426).
- success → step 3 result; failure → `#mig-step2-msg`.

**Step 3 — result:** success message in `#mig-result-msg`/`#mig-result-sub`; **Done** → `closeModal('migrate-modal');refresh()`.

**GAPS:**

❌ / 🔴 **No `_isManager`/`_isAdmin` gate on import.** The nav button `#nav-import-btn` is unhidden for **every logged-in user** (`app.js.html` 1058–1060, comment: "Import Tasks nav visible to all logged-in users"), and **all three backend functions** only call `getCurrentUser(email)` with no role check:
  - `migrationPreview(email, sheetId, sheetName)` (migration.gs 388–391) — `var user = getCurrentUser(email);` then proceeds.
  - `migrationImport(email, sheetId, projId, rowIndices, sheetName)` (426–428) — same.
  - `migrationImportDirectRows(email, projId, rowsData)` (467–469) — same.
  This means any authenticated Team Member can bulk-create functions/sub-functions/tasks and assign them to arbitrary employees (assigner/assignee resolved server-side from CSV names). This contradicts the manager-scoped intent of bulk import. **BLOCKING/HIGH.**

⚠️ `_migExtractId` accepts a raw ID, but if the user pastes a non-sheet string it is passed through as-is and the backend permission error path is the only feedback.

⚠️ Dead/legacy code: `_parseCsvLine` (16304) is defined but unused (the live parser is `_parseCsv`). NOTE only.

---

## PART 6: CHATS

The **Chats** sidebar section lives in `#nav-chats-wrap` (`index.html` 1875–1878):

```html
<div id="nav-chats-wrap">
  <div class="nav-sec hidden" id="nav-tc-sec">Chats</div>
  <div id="nav-tc-list"></div>
</div>
```

`#nav-chats-wrap` is force-hidden on mobile (`#nav-chats-wrap{display:none}` in the 768px media query, plus the `_rsp_bypass` IIFE injects `#nav-chats-wrap{display:none!important}` — `index.html` 1523/1666). On desktop it is populated asynchronously.

**Load pipeline:**

1. On login, `onPayloadLoaded` calls `_loadNavTeamChats()` (`app.js.html` 1082).
2. `_loadNavTeamChats()` (13227–13237) → `getChatSpaceConfig(APP.currentUser.email)` (backend `chatSpaces.gs` 388). Success sets module globals:
   - `DIR_TEAM_SPACES = cfg.teams` (`teamName → {spaceId, uri}`)
   - `DIR_GENERAL_SPACE = cfg.general` (`{spaceId, uri}` | null)
   - `DIR_CHAT_CONNECTED = !!cfg.connected`
   then calls `_navPopulateTeamChats()`. Failure handler is a silent no-op.
3. `_navPopulateTeamChats()` (13276–13333) renders into `#nav-tc-list`.

**Rendered links:**

- **Team Chat** — only the user's *own* team (`DIR_TEAM_SPACES[u.team]`). Rendered as an external link:
  ```html
  <a href="<uri>" target="_blank" class="nav-item-ext"> …group icon… <Team> Chat <open_in_new arrow></a>
  ```
  Field: `<Team> Chat` link — element `<a target="_blank">`, icon `group`, trailing `open_in_new`; opens the Google Chat space in a new tab. wired: yes. data source: `DIR_TEAM_SPACES` (from `getChatSpaceConfig`). gaps: only the user's single team space is shown; members of multiple teams or admins wanting other teams' spaces have no entry here (by design).
- **General Chat** — shown to everyone when `DIR_GENERAL_SPACE.uri` exists; icon `forum`, opens `DIR_GENERAL_SPACE.uri` in a new tab.

If a non-admin has no team space and no general space, the whole `#nav-tc-sec` section is re-hidden and `#nav-tc-list` cleared (13305–13310).

**Admin controls** (only when `_isAdmin(u.role)`, appended below the links, 13316–13330):

Button: **Connect Google Chat** (shown when `!DIR_CHAT_CONNECTED`)
- element: `<button id="btn-connect-chat" class="btn btn-outline">` icon `add_link`
- handlers: `onclick="connectChat()"` (13240)
- effect: `chatGetAuthUrl(APP.currentUser.email)` (backend `chatSpaces.gs` 21); on ok `window.open(r.url,'_blank','width=500,height=650')` and toasts "Complete Google Chat authorization in the popup, then click \"Sync Spaces\".". failure → toast.
- wired: yes
- data source: GAS call (per-user OAuth2 URL)

Button: **Sync Spaces** (shown when `DIR_CHAT_CONNECTED`)
- element: `<button id="btn-sync-chat" class="btn btn-outline">` icon `sync`
- handlers: `onclick="syncChat()"` (13258)
- effect: toasts "Syncing Chat spaces — this may take up to a minute…", then `syncChatSpacesFromUI(APP.currentUser.email)` (backend `chatSpaces.gs` 420). On ok toasts "Chat spaces synced! Refreshing links…" and re-runs `_loadNavTeamChats()` to refresh sidebar. failure → toast.
- wired: yes
- data source: GAS call (creates Team/General/Project spaces, adds members)

**External link behaviour:** all chat-space entries are real `<a href target="_blank">` anchors (not JS handlers) pointing at the Google Chat space `uri`, so they open natively in a new browser tab; the trailing `open_in_new` Material Symbol communicates this.

**`google.script.run` calls in PART 6:**

| function | called from | params | success | failure |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `getChatSpaceConfig` | `_loadNavTeamChats` | `email` | set DIR_* globals + `_navPopulateTeamChats()` | silent no-op |
| `chatGetAuthUrl` | `connectChat` | `email` | open OAuth popup + toast | toast |
| `syncChatSpacesFromUI` | `syncChat` | `email` | toast + `_loadNavTeamChats()` | toast |

**GAPS:**

⚠️ **Connect/Sync are admin-only by design but rely on connection state per-admin.** `DIR_CHAT_CONNECTED` is set from `cfg.connected` (any admin connected). A non-connected admin sees **Connect Google Chat**; after another admin connected they see **Sync Spaces** but their own OAuth token may be absent — `syncChatSpacesFromUI` will then surface the backend error "Chat not connected. Click \"Connect Google Chat\" first." (chatSpaces.gs 425). This is a confusing UX state (the button shown is Sync, but the action requires Connect). ⚠️ PARTIAL.

⚠️ The `getChatSpaceConfig` failure handler is a **silent no-op** — if it fails, the Chats section simply never appears with no toast/log, making "missing chats" indistinguishable from "no spaces". ⚠️ LOW.

NOTE: Chat command-bot (`chat.gs` `task:`/`log:` parser) and Google Chat space creation logic (`chatSpaces.gs`) are server-only and out of UI scope for this slice; the frontend exposes only the three calls above plus the external link anchors.


## PART 7: GAS BACKEND — COMPLETE FUNCTION REFERENCE

This part documents **every server function the frontend invokes via `google.script.run`** plus the cross-cutting permission helpers, then flags unused / broken / unguarded backend functions.

**Method.** All 158 `google.script.run` chains in `src/app.js.html` were parsed with a balanced-paren walker that strips `withSuccessHandler` / `withFailureHandler` / `withUserObject` and takes the terminal method as the backend target. Three dynamic-dispatch chains were resolved by hand:
- line 789 — `.loginWithPassword(email, password)`
- line 1984 — `[APP.currentUser.role === 'Intern' ? 'getInternWorkLogs' : 'getMyWorkLogs'](email, start, end)`
- line 6960 — `[tid ? 'updateTask' : 'createTask'].apply(null, arg)`
- line 13470 — `.getAllPresence(email)` (chain my parser mis-grouped; verified manually)
- line 6225 — `.getPendingDueDateCount(email)` (also feature-detected via `typeof google.script.run.getPendingDueDateCount === 'function'`)

**Result:** 108 distinct frontend-called backend functions, of which **107 have a definition** in `src/*.gs` and **1 (`submitFormResponse`) has none** 🔴.

### 7.0 Cross-cutting permission primitives (verified `auth.gs`)

```javascript
var ADMIN_ROLES   = ['Super Admin', 'Admin'];                                   // auth.gs:185
var MANAGER_ROLES = ['Super Admin', 'Admin', 'Team Captain', 'Team Facilitator'];// auth.gs:186
function _isAdmin(role)   { return ADMIN_ROLES.indexOf(role)   !== -1; }        // auth.gs:188
function _isManager(role) { return MANAGER_ROLES.indexOf(role) !== -1; }        // auth.gs:189
```

```javascript
function getCurrentUser(email) {                                                // auth.gs:275
  if (!email) throw new Error('Session expired. Please refresh and log in again.');
  if (_CUR_USER_CACHE[email]) return _CUR_USER_CACHE[email];
  var emp = getEmployeeByEmail(email);
  if (!emp) throw new Error('Not registered: ' + email + ' ...');
  var result = { emp: emp, role: emp['Role'], empId: emp['Emp_ID'], email: email };
  _CUR_USER_CACHE[email] = result; return result;
}
```

- `getCurrentUser(email)` is the universal session gate. Every protected function calls it first; it throws (→ frontend `withFailureHandler`) for missing/unknown email. **It does NOT verify the session token** — identity is asserted purely by the `email` parameter the client sends (`APP._verifiedEmail` / `APP.currentUser.email`). Any caller who knows a valid employee email can act as that user for any function whose only gate is `getCurrentUser`. ⚠️ (architectural; matches `executeAs: USER_DEPLOYING` model.)
- `canModifyTask(task, user)` (auth.gs:848) — Admin → true; Manager → team-member assignee/assigner or unassigned-task-in-team-project; TM → assignee or assigner of the task.
- `_isTmSelfAssign(record, user)` (auth.gs:193) — true if Manager, or assignee list empty, or sole assignee is self.
- Response convention: success returns `{ ok:true, ... }` **or** a bare value (e.g. `createTask` returns the new ID string; `getMyWorkLogs` returns a bare array). Several functions `throw` on error instead of returning `{ ok:false }` (CRUD in auth.gs) — these surface in the frontend `withFailureHandler` rather than the success handler. ⚠️ inconsistent contract.

---

### 7.1 Authentication & Session (`auth.gs`)

**`loginWithPassword(email, password)`** — auth.gs:526
- Params: email (string), password (raw string).
- Returns: `{ ok:true, token, name, email, role, designation, team, sub_department, empId }` or `{ ok:false, error }`.
- Permission: none (pre-auth). Validates `Is_Active==='TRUE'` + `SHA256(password+'tms_2025')` match.
- Sheets read: Employees. Sheets written: ScriptProperties `sess_{uuid}` (TTL 7d). LockService: none. Cache: none.
- Side effects: creates session token inline (returned as `token`; non-fatal on failure → `token=''`).
- Called-from: login form submit (app.js:789). Success handler fills login user-card, saves `r.token` to `localStorage[tm_sess]` + `APP._sessToken`.
- Gaps: password hash is legacy `SHA256(pw+'tms_2025')` per `hashPassword` (auth.gs) ⚠️ — CLAUDE.md flags migration to Argon2.

**`validateSession(token)`** — auth.gs:1871
- Params: token (string).
- Returns: `{ ok:true, ...getInitialPayload }` or `{ ok:false, reason:'not_found'|'expired'|'payload_error'|'error', error? }`.
- Permission: token-only. Null-guards `''`/`'null'`/`'undefined'`.
- Sheets read: (via getInitialPayload) Tasks, Projects, Employees, Functions, Attachments, Leaves. Written: ScriptProperties (sliding-extends `sess_` expiry).
- Side effects: sliding 7-day TTL refresh; on expiry deletes token.
- Called-from: DOMContentLoaded auto-login (app.js:164). transient `reason:'error'`/`'payload_error'` keep token; `expired`/`not_found` clear it.

**`createSession(email)`** — auth.gs:1861. Returns `{ ok:true, token }`. Written: ScriptProperties. Called-from app.js:1016 (legacy belt-and-suspenders; login already returns a token). ⚠️ Mostly redundant now (CLAUDE.md #39).

**`invalidateSession(token)`** — auth.gs:1895. Returns `{ ok:true }` always (fails silent). Deletes `sess_{token}`. Called-from logout (app.js:1096) → then `location.reload()`.

**`requestPasswordReset(email)`** — auth.gs:287. Pre-auth. Returns `{ok}`/`{ok:false,error}`. Generates 6-digit OTP, stores `pw_otp_{email}` (15-min), emails via GmailApp. Read: Employees. Called-from app.js:827.

**`resetPasswordWithOTP(email, otp, newPassword)`** — auth.gs:321. Pre-auth. Validates OTP + expiry; `newPassword.length>=6`. Writes Employees.Password_Hash, deletes OTP prop. Called-from app.js:852.

**`changePassword(email, currentPassword, newPassword)`** — auth.gs:353. Gate: `getCurrentUser`. Verifies current hash; `newPassword>=6`. Writes Employees.Password_Hash; clears `_CUR_USER_CACHE`. Called-from app.js:977.

---

### 7.2 Initial Payload / Profile (`auth.gs`)

**`getInitialPayload(email)`** — auth.gs:577
- Returns: `{ ok:true, currentUser:{name,email,role,empId,designation,team,sub_department}, tasks, projects, employees, functions, pendingLeaveCount, attCounts, hasMisAccess }` or `{ ok:false, error }`.
- Permission: `getCurrentUser`; data scoped by `getAuthorizedTasks/Projects/Employees/Functions`.
- Sheets read: Tasks, Projects, Employees, Functions, Attachments, Leaves (via getPendingLeaveCount). Written: none.
- Single round-trip on login + session-restore (CLAUDE.md performance). Called-from app.js:995/8233/8255/12895.
- `hasMisAccess` computed via `wsCheckMisAccess` (weekly-summary.gs).

**`getMyProfile(email)`** — auth.gs:371. Gate getCurrentUser. Returns profile fields + `pending` profile-update request (if any). Read: Employees, Profile_Update_Requests. Called-from app.js:885.

**`submitProfileUpdate(record, email)`** — auth.gs:408. Gate getCurrentUser. Designation change applies immediately; team/subdept/manager change → inserts `Profile_Update_Requests` (Pending) unless one already pending. Returns `{ok, immediate, reqId?}`. Called-from app.js:944.

**`getPendingProfileRequests(email)`** — auth.gs:450. Gate `_isManager`. Admins see all; TC/TF see own-team only. Returns `{ok, requests}`. Called-from app.js:6307.

**`approveProfileUpdate(reqId, email)`** — auth.gs:480. Gate `_isManager`. Applies Team/Sub_Department/Designation/Manager_ID to Employees; marks request Approved; invalidates org tree + `_CUR_USER_CACHE`. Called-from app.js:6318.

**`rejectProfileUpdate(reqId, notes, email)`** — auth.gs:512. Gate `_isManager`. Marks Rejected with notes. Called-from app.js:6332.

### 7.3 Task / Project / Function CRUD (`auth.gs`)

**`createTask(record, email)`** — auth.gs:870
```javascript
function createTask(record, email) {
  var user = getCurrentUser(email);
  var now = _nowTs();
  var newId = generateId('Tasks', 'TSK', 5);
  record.Task_ID = newId; record.Assigner_ID = record.Assigner_ID || user.empId;
  record.Status = record.Status || 'Yet to Start';
```
- Returns: bare `newId` string (e.g. `TSK-00042`). Throws on error.
- Permission: **only `getCurrentUser`** — ⚠️ any authenticated user can create a task. Defaults missing assignee to self.
- Sheets read: Tasks (re-warm), Projects (via `_resolveTeamsToIds`). Written: Tasks (+Cal_Event via `_tryCalTaskSync`, +Chat space members). LockService: none. Cache: `_dbInvalidate('Tasks'); dbGetAll('Tasks')` write-through.
- Side effects: calendar event create, project-chat-space member add, Assignment_History append.
- Called-from app.js:6960 (dynamic), 7554/7571/7688/7694/7716/10252/10828 (batch add, project wizard, sub-task add).

**`updateTask(taskId, updates, email)`** — auth.gs:898. Gate `canModifyTask` (Admin/team-manager/assignee/assigner). Throws if not authorized. Writes Tasks; appends Assignment_History on assignee change; cal sync (DELETE on Done/Completed/Cancelled). Write-through cache. Called-from app.js:6960/7712/10074/10172/5309.

**`deleteTask(taskId, email)`** — auth.gs:1024. Gate: Admin, OR task owner (Assigner), OR manager-who-is-assignee. Deletes row, cal DELETE, write-through cache. Called-from app.js:6783.

**`createProject(record, email)`** — auth.gs:942. Gate **`_isManager`** (`'Employees cannot create projects.'`). Owner=creator. Returns bare newId. Writes Projects; creates project chat space; cal sync; warms Projects cache. Called-from app.js:7554.

**`updateProject(projId, updates, email)`** — auth.gs:976. Gate: Admin, OR Assigner/Owner/Assignee of project (TMs in Assignee_IDs allowed). Protects `Owner_IDs` (deleted from updates). Cal sync. Called-from app.js:7510.

**`deleteProject(projId, email)`** — auth.gs:1043. Gate `_isManager`; non-admin must be Assigner or Owner. Cal DELETE + row delete. Called-from app.js:6792.

**`createFunction(record, email)`** — auth.gs:1068
```javascript
function createFunction(record, email) {
  var user = getCurrentUser(email);
  if (!_isManager(user.role) && !_isTmSelfAssign(record, user)) {
    throw new Error('Not authorized to create functions for others. ...');
  }
```
- Gate: `_isManager` OR `_isTmSelfAssign`. Returns `{ ok:true, id }`. Writes Functions. No cache warm. Called-from app.js:7583/7609/7688/10759/10791/11861.

**`updateFunction(fnId, updates, email)`** — auth.gs:1098. Gate: `_isManager` OR (assignee/creator/assigner of fn). Returns `{ok:true}`. Called-from app.js:7710/9732/9757/9824/11743.

**`deleteFunction(fnId, email)`** — auth.gs:1115. Gate `_isManager`. Cascade-deletes child sub-functions, unlinks their tasks (`SubFn_ID/Function_ID=''`), then deletes the fn. `_dbInvalidate('Tasks')` x2. Returns `{ok:true}`. Called-from app.js:7708/11768.

### 7.4 Progress Updates (`auth.gs`)

**`submitProgressUpdate(record, email)`** — auth.gs:1141. Gate `canModifyTask`. Inserts Progress_Updates, increments Task.Actual_Hours. Returns bare `Update_ID`. Called-from app.js:6740.

**`getTaskProgressUpdates(taskId, email)`** — auth.gs:1168. Gate: Admin → all; Manager → team assignee/own; TM → assignee. Returns array (enriched w/ Author_Name). Throws if unauthorized. Called-from app.js:6674/6745.

### 7.5 Work Log (`auth.gs` + `intern-work-log.gs`)

**`submitWorkLog(record, email)`** — auth.gs:1216
```javascript
function submitWorkLog(record, email) {
  var lock = LockService.getScriptLock();
  if (!lock.tryLock(20000)) { ...; return { ok:false, error:'Server busy ...' }; }
  try {
    var user  = getCurrentUser(email);
    var newId = _wlNextId();
```
- Returns: bare `newId` (e.g. `WL-00001`) or `{ok:false,error}` on lock fail.
- Permission: `getCurrentUser` (self only). `Status`/`Comments` only persisted if `_isManager` (else forced `''`).
- Sheets read: Work_Log (via `_wlNextId` direct sheet scan + `_wdDurationForDate`). Written: Work_Log. **LockService: tryLock(20000)** (ID-collision fix #43). Cache: `_dbInvalidate('Work_Log')`.
- Called-from app.js:3210 (`saveWeekEntry` new-entry path).

**`updateWorkLog(logId, updates, email)`** — auth.gs:1294. Gate: own log OR Admin. Returns `{ok:true}`. No lock (known logId). Called-from app.js:3198.

**`updateWorkLogStatus(empId, dateKey, newStatus, callerEmail)`** — auth.gs:1259. Gate `_isManager`. Finds log by Emp_ID+date(10), writes Status. Returns `{ok:true}`. Called-from app.js:2365.

**`updateWorkLogComment(empId, dateKey, newComment, callerEmail)`** — auth.gs:1271. Gate `_isManager`. Writes Comments. Called-from app.js:2386.

**`getMyWorkLogs(email, startDate?, endDate?)`** — auth.gs:1306. Gate getCurrentUser. Returns **bare array** of own logs (date-filtered). Called-from app.js:1989 (dynamic, non-intern).

**`getMyWlWeekSummary(email, isoStart, isoEnd)`** — auth.gs:1320. Gate getCurrentUser. Returns `{ok, data:[{isoDate,attendance,hasWork,hrs}]}` (7 days). Reads Work_Log + Holidays. Called-from app.js:1339 (dashboard mini week strip).

**`getMemberWorkLogs(targetEmpId, adminEmail, startDate?, endDate?)`** — auth.gs:1372. Gate `_isManager`. Routes interns → `_getInternWlLogs`. Returns bare array. Called-from app.js:4167.

**`adminSubmitWorkLog(record, targetEmpId, adminEmail)`** — auth.gs:1391. Gate `_isManager`. **LockService tryLock(20000)** + `_wlNextId`. Persists Status/Comments unconditionally (admin path). Returns bare newId or `{ok:false}`. Called-from app.js:4478/4984.

**`adminUpdateWorkLog(logId, updates, adminEmail)`** — auth.gs:1442. Gate `_isManager`. Backfills Work_Duration when absent. Returns `{ok:true}`. Called-from app.js:4465/4967.

**`getTeamWorkLogs(email, startDate?, endDate?)`** — auth.gs:1464. Gate `_isManager`. Admin → all logs; TC/TF → `_getTeamEmpIds` filtered. Merges Intern_Work_Log. Returns `{ logs:[...{Emp_Name,Team}], holidays:[iso] }`. Called-from app.js:3548.

**`saveInternWorkLog(record, email)`** — intern-work-log.gs:64. Gate **`user.role === 'Intern'`** (`'Only Interns can use this function.'`). Upsert by Emp_ID+Date; LockService on insert via `_ilNextId`. Returns `{ok:true, logId}`. Called-from app.js:3155.

**`getInternWorkLogs(email, startDate?, endDate?)`** — intern-work-log.gs:126. Gate getCurrentUser; returns own intern logs (bare array, `[]` on error). Called-from app.js:1989 (dynamic, intern).

**`adminSaveInternWorkLog(record, targetEmpId, adminEmail)`** — intern-work-log.gs:147. Gate `_isManager`. Upsert by Emp_ID+Date; LockService on insert. Returns `{ok:true, logId}`. Called-from app.js:4948.

> ⚠️ `reviewWorkLog(logId, status, adminComments, email)` (auth.gs:1282) is gated `_isManager` but is **NOT called from the frontend** and has **0 internal callers** (only referenced in `tests.gs`). UNUSED — superseded by `updateWorkLogStatus`/`updateWorkLogComment`/`adminUpdateWorkLog`.

### 7.6 Leaves & Holidays (`leaves.gs`)

**`submitLeaveRequest(record, email)`** — leaves.gs:7. Gate getCurrentUser. Validates type/dates; Half Day must be single day (Days=0.5). Inserts Leaves (Pending). Returns `{ok:true, leaveId}`. Called-from app.js:12934.

**`reviewLeaveRequest(leaveId, status, notes, email)`** — leaves.gs:48. Gate `_isManager`; non-admin allowed when `emp.Manager_ID === user.empId` (direct report) **OR** `_getTeamEmpIds(user).has(leave.Emp_ID)` (same-team). On Approve → calendar event; on Reject of approved → delete cal. Returns `{ok:true}`. Called-from app.js:12889.

**`getMyLeaves(email)`** — leaves.gs:92. Gate getCurrentUser. Returns `{ok, leaves}` (own, newest first). Called-from app.js:12803.

**`getPendingLeaves(email)`** — leaves.gs:105. Gate `_isManager`. Admin → all pending; TC/TF → `Manager_ID === user.empId` **OR** same-Team (via `_getTeamEmpIds(user)`). Returns `{ok, leaves:[...Emp_Name]}`. Called-from app.js:12842.

**`addHoliday(record, email)`** — leaves.gs:137. Gate `_isAdmin`. Inserts Holidays + cal sync. Returns `{ok:true, holidayId}`. Called-from app.js:13010.

**`deleteHoliday(holidayId, email)`** — leaves.gs:164. Gate `_isAdmin`. Cal DELETE + row delete. Returns `{ok:true}`. Called-from app.js:13028.

**`getHolidays(email)`** — leaves.gs:182. Gate getCurrentUser (session only). Returns `{ok, holidays}`. Called-from app.js:12958.

**`getCalendarData(email)`** — leaves.gs:195. Gate getCurrentUser. Leaves scoped by role (Admin all / manager subordinates / self). Returns calendar payload (leaves + holidays). Called-from app.js:12054.

### 7.7 Due-Date Change Requests (`dueDateRequests.gs`)

**`requestDueDateChange(record, email)`** — dueDateRequests.gs:14. Gate getCurrentUser. If Admin OR entity's Assigner → returns `{ok:true, direct:true}` (frontend then edits directly). Else inserts Due_Date_Requests (Pending). Returns `{ok, direct:false, requestId}`. Called-from app.js:6192.

**`getDueDateRequests(email)`** — dueDateRequests.gs:65. Gate getCurrentUser. Admin → all Pending; else where `Approver_ID===empId`. Returns `{ok, requests:[...Requestor_Name]}`. Called-from app.js:6232.

**`getPendingDueDateCount(email)`** — dueDateRequests.gs:109. Wraps getDueDateRequests; returns `{ok:true, count}` (never throws). Called-from app.js:6225; also `typeof`-feature-detected at app.js:1066/6216 to gate the badge.

**`approveDueDateChange(requestId, email)`** — dueDateRequests.gs:121. Gate: Admin OR Approver_ID. Applies `Due_Date`(Task)/`Deadline`(Function) to entity; marks Approved. Returns `{ok:true}`. Called-from app.js:6274.

**`rejectDueDateChange(requestId, notes, email)`** — dueDateRequests.gs:155. Gate: Admin OR Approver_ID. Marks Rejected. Returns `{ok:true}`. Called-from app.js:6291.

### 7.8 Registration & Role (`auth.gs`)

**`submitRegistration(record)`** — auth.gs:1597
```javascript
function submitRegistration(record) {
  try {
    var passwordHash = '';
    if (record.password_hash && ...) passwordHash = String(record.password_hash);
    else if (record.password && ...) passwordHash = hashPassword(String(record.password));
```
- **No `email` param, no auth** (pre-account, by design). Validates required fields, rejects duplicate email / pending. Inserts Registration_Requests. Returns `{ok:true, reqId}`. Called-from app.js:7931.

**`getRegistrationRequests(email, myOnly)`** — auth.gs:1659. Gate `_isManager` (non-managers get `{ok:true, requests:[]}`). Admin+!myOnly → all; TC/TF → manager-match OR team-match. Called-from app.js:6111.

**`approveRegistration(reqId, email)`** — auth.gs:1683. Gate `_isManager`; non-admin must be designated-manager or same-team manager. Creates Employee, adds to team chat space, marks Approved. Returns `{ok:true, empId}`. Called-from app.js:6421.

**`rejectRegistration(reqId, email, notes)`** — auth.gs:1743. Gate `_isManager` + same authority check. Marks Rejected. Returns `{ok:true}`. Called-from app.js:6479.

**`changeEmployeeRole(targetEmpId, newRole, email)`** — auth.gs:1803. Gate via `_allowedNewRoles(actorRole, targetCurrentRole)` matrix (SA→any; Admin→up to Admin, not SA/Admin targets; TC→TM/Intern→managerial, own team only). Cannot change own role. Returns `{ok:true, empId, oldRole, newRole}` or `{ok:false,error}`. Called-from app.js:6459.

**`getTeamCaptainByTeam(team, subDept)`** — auth.gs:1525. **Pre-auth** (called before account exists). Sub-dept TC match → team TC → fallbacks (DEFAULT_MANAGER_EMAIL prop → any SA → any Admin). Returns `{ok:true, email, name}`. Called-from app.js:7838.

### 7.9 Directory & Org (`directory-only.gs`, `auth.gs`)

**`getTeamDirectory(email)`** — directory-only.gs:3. Gate getCurrentUser. Returns team members w/ manager names + chat links. Called-from app.js:13063.

**`getCompanyDirectory(email)`** — directory-only.gs:43. Gate getCurrentUser (session only). Returns all active employees. Called-from app.js:13082/13119.

**`getOrgChartData()`** — auth.gs:817. ⚠️ **No `email` parameter and NO permission check.** Returns full active-employee org tree (`{empId,name,role,designation,team,subDept,managerId}`). Called-from app.js:13850. Any caller with the deployment URL can enumerate the entire org.

### 7.10 Dashboard (`dashboard.gs`)

**`getDashboardExtras(email)`** — dashboard.gs:4. Gate getCurrentUser. Returns `{ok, notices, onLeave, scores, scoreScope}`. Reads Employees once and passes to `_getNotices/_getOnLeaveToday/_getScores`. Called-from app.js:1237/1464/1511.

**`createAnnouncement(record, email)`** — dashboard.gs:229. Gate `_isAdmin`. Validity window (Target_Date=start, Expires_At=end, default +7d), Visibility validated against `['Organisation','TCs & TFs','TCs Only']`. Returns `{ok:true, annId}`. Called-from app.js:1452.

**`deleteAnnouncement(annId, email)`** — dashboard.gs:272. Gate `_isAdmin`. Soft-delete (`Is_Active='FALSE'`). Returns `{ok:true}`. Called-from app.js:1507.

---

### 7.11 Meetings (`meet.gs`)

**`scheduleMeeting(recordOrTitle, emailOrStartIso, durationMins?, attendeeEmails?, description?, extProps?)`** — meet.gs:32. Dual-signature (object new-style / positional legacy). New-style resolves attendeeIds + attendeeTeams → emails → GCal `attendees` + `sendUpdates=all`, stores shared ext-props (`tm_attendee_ids/teams/creator_email`). Gate: implicit (`getCurrentUser` in object branch). Returns meeting result. Called-from app.js:8180.

**`scheduleMeetingWithTemplate(record, email)`** — meet.gs:320. Gate getCurrentUser; type='company'→`_isAdmin`, type='team'→`_isManager`. Resolves attendees by template, creates cal+Meet event. Called-from app.js:8184.

**`getMeetings(email)`** — meet.gs:499. Gate getCurrentUser. Filters `getUpcomingMeetings()` via `_userCanSeeMeeting` (creator/organizer/explicit-attendee/admin). Returns `{ok, meetings, isAdmin, isManager, userTeam}`. Called-from app.js:7956/13359.

**`getMeetingsForRange(startDate, endDate, email)`** — meet.gs:187. ⚠️ **No `getCurrentUser` gate** — reads the caller's *primary* Calendar directly via OAuth. CacheService-backed (`mtg_{email}_{start}_{end}`, 10m). Returns `{ok, meetings}`. Called-from app.js:1990 (`_wlLoadMeetingsAsync`).

**`cancelMeetingById(calEventId, email)`** — meet.gs:530. Gate getCurrentUser; allowed if Admin or event organizer/creator. Fetches event to verify. Called-from app.js:8204.

---

### 7.12 Work Duration / Clock (`work-duration.gs`)

**`wdGetStatus(email)`** — work-duration.gs:212. Gate getCurrentUser. Force-invalidates WD+WDB cache, single filtered read. Returns `{ok, status, session, breaks, activity, history(14d), totalBreakMins}`. Called-from app.js:15291.

**`wdClockIn(email)`** — work-duration.gs:35. Gate getCurrentUser. Reopens today's COMPLETED session (resume) or inserts new. Returns `{ok:true, sessionId, clockIn, resumed?}` or `{ok:false}`. No lock. Called-from app.js:15310/13457.

**`wdClockOut(email, sessionId, customTime?, reason?)`** — work-duration.gs:89. Gate getCurrentUser. Auto-closes open break; optional HH:MM custom time (validated > clock-in). Writes Clock_Out/Net/Status=COMPLETED + syncs Work_Log duration. Returns `{ok, clockOut, netMins, totalBreakMins}`. `_dbInvalidate(WDB)`. Called-from app.js:15326/15425.

**`wdStartBreak(email, sessionId)`** — work-duration.gs:152. Inserts Work_Breaks, Status=ON_BREAK. Returns `{ok, breakId, breakStart}`. Called-from app.js:15444.

**`wdEndBreak(email, sessionId)`** — work-duration.gs:178. Closes break, Status=ACTIVE, increments `Total_Break_Mins`. `_dbInvalidate(WD+WDB)`. Returns `{ok, breakEnd, breakMins}`. Called-from app.js:15459.

**`wdEditTime(email, startTime, endTime, breakMins, reason)`** — work-duration.gs:289. Gate getCurrentUser; reason required. Rebuilds Clock_In/Out from date+HH:MM, validates end>start. Audit note. Returns `{ok,...}`. Called-from app.js:16021/16065.

**`wdEditBreak(email, totalBreakMins)`** — work-duration.gs:507. Gate getCurrentUser. Sets Total_Break_Mins (recalcs Net if completed). `_dbInvalidate(WD)`. Returns `{ok, totalBreakMins, netWorkMins}`. Called-from app.js:15840.

**`getTeamClockStatus(email)`** — work-duration.gs:552. Gate `_isManager||_isAdmin`. Admin→all active; TC/TF→`_getTeamEmpIds`. Returns `{ok, data:[{empId,name,avatar,status,clockInTs,totalBreakMins,netWorkMins}]}` sorted by status. Called-from app.js:16101.

**`getWorkDurationsForDates(email, startDate, endDate)`** — work-duration.gs:693. ⚠️ **No permission gate** — resolves Emp_ID by the `email` arg directly (no `getCurrentUser`/role check), so a caller can read **any** employee's clock durations by passing their email. Returns `{ok, data:{iso:'HH:MM:SS'}}`. Called-from app.js:2448/2527 (`_wlLoadDurationsAsync`).

**`getTeamWorkDurationsRange(email, startDate, endDate)`** — work-duration.gs:728. Gate `_isManager`; admin→all, else team-filtered. Returns `{ok, data:{'empId:iso':'HH:MM:SS'}}`. Called-from app.js:2481 (`_tlLoadDurationsAsync`).

---

### 7.13 Attachments (`attachments.gs`)

**`uploadAttachment(entityType, entityId, fileName, mimeType, base64Data, email)`** — attachments.gs:39. Gate getCurrentUser. Decodes base64 → Drive file (`ANYONE_WITH_LINK` view), inserts Attachments. Returns `{ok,...}`. Called-from app.js:14977/15143/15179.

**`getAttachments(entityType, entityId, email)`** — attachments.gs:84. Gate getCurrentUser. Returns `{ok, attachments}`. Called-from app.js:14854.

**`getAllAttachmentCounts(email)`** — attachments.gs:115. Gate getCurrentUser. Returns `{ok, counts:{entityId:n}}`. Called-from app.js:14832.

**`deleteAttachment(attachmentId, email)`** — attachments.gs:132. Gate: uploader OR `_isAdmin`. Trashes Drive file, soft-deletes row. Called-from app.js:15010.

### 7.14 Forms (`forms.gs`)

> All `gf*` mutating functions gate on `formsIsConnected(email)` (per-user OAuth2) rather than role — they operate on the caller's own Google Drive forms. `gfSetFormSharing` additionally requires `_isManager`.

**`formsGetAuthUrl(email)`** — forms.gs:11. Returns `{ok, url}` or `{ok:false}` if KEEP_CLIENT_ID/SECRET unset. Called-from app.js:14361.

**`formsIsConnected(email)`** — forms.gs:80. Returns bare boolean (`!!forms_rt_{email}`). Called-from app.js:14648.

**`gfListMyForms(email)`** — forms.gs:149. Drive query for owned forms. `{ok, forms}` / `{ok:false, needsAuth}`. Called-from app.js:14342.

**`gfGetMyFormsMeta(email)`** — forms.gs:384. Gate getCurrentUser. Reads Forms sheet rows owned by caller. Called-from app.js:14371.

**`gfGetSharedForms(email)`** — forms.gs:350. Gate getCurrentUser. Forms shared to caller's team. Called-from app.js:14382.

**`gfGetForm(formId, email)`** — forms.gs:278. Returns `{ok, ...questions}`. Called-from app.js:14488.

**`gfGetResponses(formId, email)`** — forms.gs:297. Returns `{ok, responses}`. Called-from app.js:14707.

**`gfPublishForm(title, description, questionsJson, settingsJson, email)`** — forms.gs:189. Creates Google Form via Forms API. Called-from app.js:14672.

**`gfUpdateForm(formId, title, description, questionsJson, settingsJson, email)`** — forms.gs:235. Replaces items. Called-from app.js:14662.

**`gfDeleteForm(formId, email)`** — forms.gs:326. Trashes the Drive form. Called-from app.js:14740.

**`gfSetFormSharing(formId, visibility, share, email)`** — forms.gs:401. Gate `_isManager`. Updates Forms sheet sharing. Called-from app.js:14445/14462.

**`submitFormResponse(formId, jsonAnswers, email)`** 🔴 — Called at app.js:14808 (`google.script.run...submitFormResponse(formId,JSON.stringify(answers),APP.currentUser.email)`) but **NO backend definition exists in any `src/*.gs` file** (verified `grep -rn submitFormResponse *.gs` → only the frontend call; `tests.gs` has none). Submitting a response to a built-in form-fill view will **always hit `withFailureHandler`** ("Failed") — the success branch (which renders "Your response has been recorded.") is unreachable. BROKEN feature.

---

### 7.15 Migration / Import (`migration.gs`)

> ⚠️ All three import functions call `getCurrentUser(email)` (session check) but have **NO `_isManager`/`_isAdmin` gate** — any authenticated user can bulk-import Functions/Sub-Functions/Tasks into any project.

**`getDeployerEmail()`** — migration.gs:53. No params, no auth. Returns `{ok:true, email}`. Called-from app.js:16219.

**`migrationPreview(email, sheetId, sheetName)`** — migration.gs:388. ⚠️ session-only gate. Returns `{ok, sheetName, spreadsheetName, availableTabs, totalRows, rows, skipped, unmatchedAssigners, unmatchedExecutors}`. Called-from app.js:16560.

**`migrationImport(email, sheetId, projId, rowIndices, sheetName)`** — migration.gs:426. ⚠️ session-only gate. Validates project; parses & inserts selected rows. Returns `{ok, created, subCreated, total, projId}`. Called-from app.js:16761.

**`migrationImportDirectRows(email, projId, rowsData)`** — migration.gs:467. ⚠️ session-only gate. Enforces SubFn-needs-Function hierarchy; inserts. Returns `{ok, created, subCreated, total, projId}`. Called-from app.js:16752.

### 7.16 Weekly Summary / MIS (`weekly-summary.gs`)

**`getWeeklySummary(callerEmail, weekStart)`** — weekly-summary.gs:348. Gate getCurrentUser (own email). Returns `{ok, found, summaryId?, content?, isEdited?, ...}`. Called-from app.js:16817/17081.

**`saveWeeklySummary(callerEmail, weekStart, newContent)`** — weekly-summary.gs:374. Gate getCurrentUser (own row only). Writes Weekly_Summary (Is_Edited=TRUE). `{ok:true}`/`{ok:false,error:'Summary not found'}`. Called-from app.js:17030.

**`generateMyWeeklySummary(callerEmail, weekStart)`** — weekly-summary.gs:400. Gate getCurrentUser. Aggregates Work_Log+Intern_Work_Log for the week, calls Gemini (`gemini-2.5-flash`, key `GEMINI_API_KEY`), upserts row. `{ok, content}` or `{ok:false, error}` (no logs / AI fail). Called-from app.js:17078.

**`getMisSummaries(callerEmail, weekStart)`** — weekly-summary.gs:456. Gate getCurrentUser + `_wsHasMisAccess` (MIS_Access sheet). Dedups by Summary_ID. `{ok, summaries,...}` or `{ok:false, error:'Access denied'}`. Called-from app.js:17146.

### 7.17 Personal Notes / Todos / Ideas (`task.gs` dispatch)

> Frontend uses generic `tasks*` dispatchers (`tasklistId` ∈ `Company-Todos|Company-Notes|Company-Ideas`) that route to Todos/Notes/Ideas sheet ops. The raw `getTodos/getNotes/getIdeas/saveTodo/saveNote/saveIdea/deleteTodo/deleteNote/deleteIdea` (notes.gs) are NOT called from the frontend.

**`tasksEnsureLists(email)`** — task.gs:62. Gate getCurrentUser. Returns `{ok, lists}`. Called-from app.js:12456.

**`tasksListTasks(tasklistId, email)`** — task.gs:73. Dispatches to getTodos/getNotes/getIdeas. Returns `{ok, tasks}`. Called-from app.js:12500/12504/12508.

**`tasksCreateTask(tasklistId, title, notes, email)`** — task.gs:94. Gate getCurrentUser. Direct `dbInsert` into Todos/Notes/Ideas. Returns `{ok, task}`. Called-from app.js:12545/12650/12732.

**`tasksUpdateTask(tasklistId, taskId, title, notes, status, email)`** — task.gs:124. Direct `dbUpdate`. Returns `{ok, task}`. Called-from app.js:12557/12641/12773.

**`tasksDeleteTask(tasklistId, taskId, email)`** — task.gs:173. Dispatches to deleteTodo/deleteNote/deleteIdea. Called-from app.js:12568/12665/12788.

> ⚠️ `saveTodo`/`saveNote`/`saveIdea` (notes.gs) — public, **0 frontend, 0 internal callers** → UNUSED (superseded by `tasksCreateTask`/`tasksUpdateTask` which write the sheets directly). `getFunctions(projId, email)` (auth.gs:1061) — public, **0 frontend, 0 internal** → UNUSED (CLAUDE.md #33: frontend reads `APP.functions` synchronously). `getInternMemberWorkLogs` (intern-work-log.gs:135) — public `_isManager`-gated but **0 callers** (getMemberWorkLogs routes interns directly) → UNUSED.

---

### 7.18 Presence & Chat Spaces (`presence.gs`, `chatSpaces.gs`)

**`setMyPresence(status, email)`** — presence.gs:19. No `getCurrentUser` gate (just `if(!email)`). Validates status ∈ `online|away|dnd|offline`. Cache `pres_{email}` + ScriptProperties for dnd/offline. Returns `{ok:true}`. Called-from app.js:13453 (`_presPing`, fire-and-forget, no handlers).

**`getAllPresence(email)`** — presence.gs:42. Gate getCurrentUser. Batch cache read of all active-employee presence. Returns `{ok, presence:{email:status}}`. Called-from app.js:13470 (no failure handler).

**`getChatSpaceConfig(email)`** — chatSpaces.gs:388. No throw; returns `{teams, general, connected}` (connected = caller has token OR any SA/Admin does). Called-from app.js:13228.

**`chatGetAuthUrl(email)`** — chatSpaces.gs:21. Returns `{ok, url}` or `{ok:false}` if KEEP_CLIENT_ID/SECRET unset. Called-from app.js:13243.

**`syncChatSpacesFromUI(email)`** — chatSpaces.gs:420. Gate `_isAdmin`. Requires chat token. Triggers full sync. `{ok:true}`/`{ok:false,error}`. Called-from app.js:13262.
